heading: Gobarup vs Golden Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gobarup, Victoria and Golden Beach, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gobarup and Golden Beach have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Gobarup or Golden Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gobarup has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Golden Beach scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gobarup scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Golden Beach scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gobarup or Golden Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gobarup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
